ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution size category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES institution_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES institution_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the survey was conducted at */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey result */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the result belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the result belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "CO" INTEGER /* Number of CO (e.g., credits offered) */,
  "DA" INTEGER /* Number of DA (e.g., degrees awarded) */,
  "HC" INTEGER /* Number of HC (e.g., headcount) */,
  "VW" INTEGER /* Number of VW (e.g., volunteer workers) */,
  "students" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "faculty" INTEGER /* Number of faculty */,
  "research_projects" INTEGER /* Number of research projects */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution size (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution size */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of students for the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type (e.g., public, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., annual, biennial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES question_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the answer belongs to */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the answer belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the answer belongs to */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the validation belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the validation belongs to */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_cleaning" (
  "cleaning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleaning */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the cleaning belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the cleaning belongs to */,
  "cleaning_method" TEXT /* Method used to clean the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "cleaning_result" TEXT /* Result of the cleaning (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "cleaning_date" TEXT /* Date of the cleaning */,
  "cleaner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the cleaning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleaning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleaning_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleaning_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleaning_cleaner_id FOREIGN KEY ("cleaner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the analysis belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used to analyze the data (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
